keyboard.behavior: Open the popup and virtually focus the next option.
Open the popup and virtually focus the previous option.
Close without committing a newly navigated option.
Preserve platform text editing while focus remains in the input.
Leave the widget; popup descendants are not separate tab stops.

consumerResponsibilities: Provide a visible Label or an explicit accessible name.
Give each Item a unique string or number id and a stable textValue when its label is not plain text.
Do not place buttons, links, inputs, or other interactive descendants inside an Item.
Localize the trigger label, empty content, description, error message, and item text.
Keep remote filtering cancellable and expose loading, empty, error, and retry states outside this P1 tracer.
limitations: P1 does not promise virtualization, multiple selection, remote loading orchestration, or rich interactive item descendants.
